editor.delete.confirm_message: The product will be archived from the store. An admin can undo this.

editor.error.price_format: Price must be a whole number (full units).
editor.load_error: Could not load the product. Please return to the list.
customers.columns.name: Name
customers.empty.title: No customers yet
customers.empty.body: Customers will appear here once they sign up or place an order.
customers.error.title: Could not load customers
customers.error.body: Failed to load the customer list. Please try again.
customers.detail.no_addresses_body: This customer hasn't saved an address in their account.
customers.detail.orders_error: Could not load orders for this customer.
customers.detail.no_orders_body: This customer hasn't completed an order yet.
customers.detail.load_error: Could not load this customer right now.
orders.search_kind.label: Search by
orders.empty.title: No orders yet
orders.error.title: Could not load orders.
orders.detail.line_items.title: Item
orders.detail.transitions.empty: This order is already in a terminal state.
orders.detail.confirm_transition.title: Continue with status change?
orders.detail.confirm_transition.body: The order will move to the next status. This action is recorded in the history.
orders.detail.confirm_cancel.title: Cancel this order?
orders.detail.confirm_cancel.body: The order will be marked as cancelled. This cannot be undone.
orders.detail.error.transition: Could not change the status right now. Please try again.
orders.detail.error.cancel: Could not cancel the order right now. Please try again.
orders.detail.fulfillment.empty: No fulfillment yet. One is created automatically when the order is marked paid.
orders.detail.fulfillment.confirm_shippe: Set the status to shipped and stamp the time. Optionally add a tracking code now.
orders.detail.fulfillment.confirm_delive: The order will also be marked as fulfilled where applicable. This is recorded in the history.
orders.detail.fulfillment.confirm_cancel: Cancelling the fulfillment does not cancel the order. This cannot be undone.
orders.detail.fulfillment.error.tracking: Could not save the tracking code. Please try again.
orders.detail.fulfillment.error.transiti: Could not change the fulfillment status. Please try again.
page.coming_soon.title: Coming soon
page.coming_soon.description: This page is on the way.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure the store, default tax, shipping origin, and notification channels.
settings.section.store.title: Store
settings.field.defaultCurrency_help: Only IDR is supported today. Other currencies will be added in a later release.
settings.section.tax.title: Tax
settings.section.tax.description: Tax rate applied as the cart default.
settings.field.defaultTaxRate_help: Only active (non-archived) rates can be selected.
settings.section.shipping.title: Shipping
settings.section.shipping.description: Origin address used by couriers to compute shipping cost.
settings.section.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.section.notifications.descripti: Channels used to send updates to customers.
settings.field.notificationEmail_help: Order confirmations and status updates are sent to the customer's email.
settings.field.notificationWhatsapp_help: Requires the WhatsApp plugin to be active. When off, only email is sent.
settings.error.load: Could not load the settings right now.
settings.error.server: Could not save the settings right now. Please try again.
settings.error.validation: Some fields need to be fixed before saving.
settings.error.region_chain: Complete the region selection from the top down (province → sub-district).
categories.list_subhead: Organize the product taxonomy. Categories can have a parent to form a hierarchy.
categories.columns.name: Name
categories.empty.title: No categories yet
categories.empty.body: Create your first category to start grouping products.
categories.error.title: Could not load categories
categories.error.body: Failed to load the category list. Please try again.
categories.error.slug_format: Slug must be lowercase, hyphen-separated. Example: arabica-coffee
categories.error.validation: Some fields need fixing before you can save.
categories.error.server: Could not save the category right now. Please try again.
categories.dialog.subhead: Name and slug are required. Pick a parent to nest this category beneath another.
categories.dialog.name: Name (Bahasa Indonesia)
categories.dialog.name_en_help: Optional. Used when shoppers view the store in English.
categories.dialog.description_help: Optional internal note. Not shown to shoppers.
categories.delete.confirm_body: Category "{name}" will be removed permanently. Products that referenced it will lose this category label.
categories.delete.has_children: This category has {count} sub-categories. After deletion they become top-level categories (with no parent).
categories.delete.error: Could not delete the category right now. Please try again.
inventory.list_subhead: Stock per variant. Adjust counts on receipts, shrinkage, or audits.
inventory.stock_unknown_help: Stock will appear after the first adjustment.
inventory.empty.title: No variants yet.
inventory.empty.body: Add products and variants first to start managing stock.
inventory.error.title: Could not load inventory.
inventory.error.body: Something went wrong loading the variant list. Please try again.
inventory.adjust.title: Adjust stock
inventory.adjust.subhead: Enter a signed change. Positive numbers add stock, negative numbers remove it.
inventory.adjust.delta_help: An integer between -1,000,000 and 1,000,000, and not zero.
inventory.adjust.reason_help: Optional. Saved to the audit log alongside this change.
inventory.adjust.error.invalid: Change must be a non-zero integer between -1,000,000 and 1,000,000.
inventory.adjust.error.server: Could not save the adjustment right now. Please try again.
inventory.adjust.error.would_go_negative: This adjustment would drive stock below zero.
inventory.audit.title: Audit history
inventory.audit.subhead: Every adjustment recorded for this variant, newest first.
inventory.audit.empty.title: No audit entries yet.
inventory.audit.empty.body: Adjustments to this variant will appear here.
inventory.audit.error.title: Could not load audit history.
inventory.audit.error.body: Something went wrong fetching the audit log. Please try again.
